scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=../src/scrapower/coordinator/static/worker.js --format=esm && esbuild src/sandbox_worker.ts --outfile=../src/scrapower/coordinator/static/sandbox_worker.js --format=esm && esbuild src/sw.ts --outfile=../src/scrapower/coordinator/static/sw.js --format=esm
